data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation call.
data.assessment: The exploratory step 'Validate persona scenario #2' is dependent on a deterministic outcome that cannot be confirmed because the LLM evaluation call failed. This failure prevents any conclusive scoring or validation of the scenario behavior, leading to an inconclusive status. The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation was blocked due to an evaluator error, which is critical for determining the outcome of the scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
